findings.description: T005.json marks the task and all S0-S8 steps as done, but T005.md still says status=in_progress and the S0 drift table still describes pre-patch code state. The task cannot be used as a reliable source of truth until the markdown artifacts are reconciled with the JSON status.

S8 is marked done, but its verification only references V303 while the step description and exit criteria require V303, V304, and V306 manual evidence. A local run of the planned V306 command measured about 2167ms, not the stated <300ms target.

The durable plan reference points to c:\Users\31089\.cursor\plans\t005_开发计划深度_review_53319747.plan.md instead of a repo-versioned dev-plan artifact. docs/workflow.md expects project artifacts under .agent-dev so a fresh reviewer can rehydrate the plan without local Cursor state.

The task/spec require getLongbridgeQuote to accept symbols:string[<=10], but the added test only covers the >10 MULTI_SYMBOL_LIMIT failure. The success path for a valid multi-symbol array is not verified.

evidence.codegraph: CodeGraph CLI was available and codegraph context/query was used. MCP tools were not available in this session; codegraph callers for ensureLongbridgeAgentOnStartup returned no callers despite source imports, so direct file reads and rg were used as primary evidence.
